_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from FIMI sources — unanalysed

items.title: EUvsDisinfo publishes new weekly review on pro-Kremlin disinformation trends
items.summary: EUvsDisinfo released its latest database updates and weekly editorial highlighting ongoing pro-Kremlin narratives targeting EU policies. Relevant as it documents active FIMI campaigns in Europe.

items.title: DFRLab reports on coordinated inauthentic behavior in Middle East elections
items.summary: Atlantic Council's DFRLab uncovers network of fake accounts amplifying divisive narratives ahead of regional votes. Signals state-linked influence operations.

items.title: EU DisinfoLab releases report on AI-generated deepfakes in Balkans
items.summary: New analysis details use of AI tools in disinformation targeting Balkan elections. Highlights emerging cognitive warfare tactics.

items.title: Meta discloses removal of China-linked influence network
items.summary: Meta's latest CIB report details takedown of accounts pushing PRC narratives on social platforms. Part of ongoing platform moderation.

items.title: Google TAG blog: Iranian operation targets US users with phishing
items.summary: Threat Analysis Group identifies Iran-backed campaign using fake news sites. Focuses on influence and interference tactics.

items.title: Recorded Future: Russian GRU-linked disinfo on Ukraine aid
items.summary: Insikt Group tracks narratives undermining Western support for Ukraine. Includes operational signals from hacking groups.

items.title: NewsGuard rates 20 new misleading sites on elections
items.summary: NewsGuard adds ratings for sites spreading false election claims, many tied to foreign actors. Civil society fact-checking update.

items.title: BBC Verify debunks viral video on climate conspiracy
items.summary: BBC Verify exposes manipulated footage pushing anti-green energy narratives, linked to fossil fuel interests. Platform moderation relevant.

items.title: Wired: EU fines platform under DSA for disinfo failures
items.summary: Reports on first major DSA enforcement action against X for inadequate FIMI moderation. Regulatory development in EU.

items.title: DFRLab: New research on TikTok influence ops in Asia
items.summary: Study reveals coordinated behavior on TikTok promoting authoritarian regimes. Covers platform-specific FIMI trends.
